calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Timothy M. Flaherty, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Oliver Mar, Turstee of the Mar Living Trust.
Dennis C. Birkhimer, Esq. appeared with Christina M. Debb, individually and dba Enrico's.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 10, 2009.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Mr. Flaherty. In accordance with the agreement reached by counsel, from the period of March 1, 2009 through September 30, 2009, defendant shall pay plaintiff monthly rent of $12,000.00. This amount shall be paid in weekly installments of $3,000.00, commencing March 4, 2009. Commencing 7/1/09, defendant shall pay plaintiff monthly rent on $4,000.00 per month. On August 5, 2009 defendant shall pay plaintiff $1,000.00, and on September 2, 2009, defendant shall pay plaintiff the sum of $12,000.00.

If defendant makes timely payments, plaintiff waive attorneys' fees, re-negotiate the monthly rental payment and dismiss this matter without prejudice.

If defendant fails to adhere to the terms set forth above, plaintiff may obtain judgment without further notice.

Counsel for plaintiff shall reduce the terms this agreement to writing.

Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court.
